scenes.visual_note: The GluMira owl appears gently, no rush
scenes.subtitle_text: Take a breath. This is a safe space to learn.
scenes.voice_text: Take a breath. A new diagnosis can feel overwhelming. GluMira is here to help you understand, one step at a time.

scenes.visual_note: A single insulin curve builds slowly
scenes.subtitle_text: Insulin works in your body over hours — not instantly.
scenes.voice_text: When you take insulin, it doesn't work instantly. It has a shape — it starts slowly, works hardest at the peak, then fades over hours.

scenes.visual_note: The tail end of an insulin curve pulses gently
scenes.subtitle_text: Even when you think it's gone, insulin has a quiet tail still working.
scenes.voice_text: Even hours after your dose, there's a quiet tail of insulin still active. Understanding this helps avoid unexpected lows.

scenes.visual_note: A simple terrain map shows insulin coverage over 24 hours
scenes.subtitle_text: GluMira maps your insulin across the whole day — no gaps, no surprises.
scenes.voice_text: GluMira maps your insulin across the entire day. You'll see where you're covered and where there might be gaps.

scenes.visual_note: A reassuring shield wraps around the user's data
scenes.subtitle_text: Your data is private and secure. GluMira is educational, not medical.
scenes.voice_text: Your data is completely private. And remember — GluMira is an educational tool. Always work with your healthcare team.

scenes.visual_note: Gentle celebration — warm glow, no overwhelm
scenes.subtitle_text: You're doing great. Let's set up your profile together.
scenes.voice_text: You're doing great. Let's set up your profile — take your time, there's no rush.
